title: Amethyst Revamped
description: A mod that completely revamps the Amethyst Ore, adding a new tool + armor pack, a new shield, new blocks and more to come!
body:
![Amethyst Revamped title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074ae650bf2558d37f65488653840e83b3b612f8_0.webp)

Welcome to Amethyst Revamped! This is a small mod that aims to give more uses to the Amethyst ore and make it more worth going out of your way and freeing-up inventory space to get it.

# WHAT DOES IT ADD?

As of version 1.0.0, AR adds many useful and innovating features to the game of Minecraft. These features can be divided up to 2 categories and a special item.

### TOOLS & ARMOR

AR adds Amethyst tools and armor to the game! These tools are a mid-game equipment, and they have stats that fit right in between Iron and Diamond tier, but they're not a requirement for progression. You can still skip over from iron to diamond if you'd like!

![Amethyst tools & armor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16d23162b598d3307ee6b67f68a19db2e8ca42bc.png)

### DECORATIVE BLOCKS

Aside from the gear you can obtain with this mod, you can also craft pretty-looking blocks to decorate your builds on your Minecraft world! These blocks include:

- Amethyst Bricks
- Amethyst Brick Stairs
- Amethyst Brick Slab
- Amethyst Brick Wall
- Smooth Basalt Bricks
- Smooth Basalt Brick Stairs
- Smooth Basalt Brick Slab
- Smooth Basalt Brick Wall
- Calcite Stairs
- Calcite Slab
- Calcite Wall
- Amethyst Ore

![Smooth Basalt Bricks & Amethyst Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/485bcd277544d85b9428b5657acedf12eba2d574.png)

### SPECIAL ITEM: THE AMETHYST SHIELD

The Amethyst shield is a feature many other peopel suggested to be added, but I decdied to put my own spin on it. The Amethyst Shield is crafted with a regular shield and 3 Amethyst shards surrounding it. The way it works is that every time an entity attacks the wielder whilst the shield is being held up/blocking, the entity that attacked the wielder takes damage. This damage ranges from 3 (1 and a half hearts of damage) to 8 (4 hearts of damage) depending on the level of the Sharpness enchantment applied to the shield.

![Amethyst Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33e3383e9fe5ad5787f00e9dccebd2f75cc15221.png)

# HOW DO I PLAY THIS MOD?

Well, it's simple! All you have to do is find an Amethyst geode, collect the Amethysts, and make the tools, armor and shield. Can't find a geode? No problem! I've also added Amethyst Ore blocks that act as regular ores, and give you Amethyst Shards.

![Amethyst Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33d2e026b2a3642b062c5524167a788ad54a28f.png)

# WILL THERE BE MORE TO IT IN THE FUTURE?

Yes! I plan on adding a structure, mobs, a golem, a special tool, upgrades to Netherite, and much much more! Just stay tuned and wait for the next updates, because they might just change how you play Minecraft. At least if you have the mod installed, it's not going to do otherwise.

![Image of Chiseled Smooth Basalt because it's the only thing I haven't put an image of in the desc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9914ee7147b2e890418afa4e2824cb1d420e231.png)

Ready to download this mod and explore the world? No?... How about now? Huh? If you want a better experience with Minecraft and a more complete feeling to Amethyst, you should try this mod out. Anyways, have a good day, and happy mining!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc28537002efdc54bbb013db911646a0ac76b3b7.png)
